name: enchanted_forest
description: Luminous and magical woods of the Fae.

templates.name: Luminous Clearing
templates.description: A soft patch of petal-strewn grass. Sunbeams filter through the canopy like golden threads.

templates.name: Fairy Shrine
templates.description: A small stone altar covered in glowing moss. Tiny lights dance around the perimeter.

templates.name: Rune Circle
templates.description: Ancient stones arranged in a perfect circle. Faint blue runes pulse with an eery cadence.

templates.name: The Great Hollow
templates.description: A massive, twisted oak with a hollow core large enough to stand in. It feels like a doorway to elsewhere.
